summary: Commercial Crime / Fidelity Guarantee insurance covering direct financial losses from employee theft, fraud, forgery, computer crime, and social engineering. Essential coverage for organisations handling cash, securities, and client funds.

schemaEntities.description: Insured organisation. Custom: EmployeeCount, ClientFundsHeld, CashHandlingVolume, DualControlProcedures, BackgroundCheckPolicy, FidelityBondHistory, CustodyOfSecurities.
61 rules: employee count-based limit adequacy, client funds custody requirements, dual control procedure validation, prior dishonesty exclusion checks, social engineering sublimit caps.

relationships.note: Employee theft limit driven by employee count and cash handling volume
Dual control and background check rules are rating modifiers

migrationIssues.detail: Business Email Compromise sublimit and verification failure trigger. Relatively new coverage -- GW Cloud crime module may not have native BEC coverage type.
Solicitor and financial adviser client funds custody requirements. FCA client money rules require specific sublimit and segregation logic.
Prior known employee dishonesty exclusion tracking. GW Cloud prior claims exclusion support available -- straightforward migration.
Multiple coverage sublimits within overall crime limit. GW Cloud coverage terms support sublimits -- configuration migration.

cloudMapping.action: Amount field vs indicator -- mapping and validation rule adjustment required
GW Cloud has coverage type -- BEC verification trigger logic needs migration
Direct mapping -- TypeKey migration for procedure types
